name: CRUYFF – World Premiere Documentary
description: First two episodes of the Cruyff documentary — produced by the team behind Senna and Drive to Survive. Never-seen footage, his own audio tapes, Guardiola on camera. 46,000 expected. A genuine once-in-a-generation Amsterdam moment.

name: Tyler Childers
description: American country/folk artist on his European Snipe Hunter tour. One of the best live acts in the game right now — if you like Sturgill Simpson or Zach Bryan, don't miss this.

name: Thuishaven w/ Adam Beyer
description: Sunday afternoon techno in one of Amsterdam's best outdoor/indoor venues. Adam Beyer headlines. €29.50 — worth it.

name: Holland Zingt Hazes – 14th edition
description: 17,000 people, Andre Jr., Roxeanne, Mart Hoogkamer, Snelle and more — 50 years of Andre Hazes celebrated exactly as it should be. Always a big night.

name: Candlelight: Amsterdam Klezmer Band
description: Klezmer, Balkan, ska and jazz by candlelight in the Portuguese Synagogue. One of the city's most beautiful venues, and a rare combination of setting and sound.
